roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOT TO S/A INFO PER PC995 FILED
PEOPLE'S OPP TO DEFT'S MTS EVID FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS & OPPOSITION/LD:01-21-15/INVOFF:SGT, SEAN PERDOMO/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/WIT SWORN:OFF, MICHAEL GRAHAM/EXHMA:PEO'S #1- 2 PAGE COMPUTER AUTOMATED DISPATCH -CERTIFIED COPY//EXHMA:PEO'S #2- PHOTO OF A REVOLVER/EXHMA:PEO'S #3- CLOSE UP PHOTO SAME REVOLVER & CYLINDER & SERIAL NO,/EXHMA:PEO'S #4- PHOTO OF SAME REVOLVER WITHOUT THE CYLINDER/EXHMA:PEO'S #5- PHOTO OF SAME REVOLVER WITH ATTACHED CYLINDER/EXHMA:PEO S #6- PHOTO OF MALE WEARING ALL DARK CLOTHING/EXHMA:DEF'S#A- PHOTO OF RED HEAD PHONES/EXHMA:DEF'S #B- PHOTO OF 24TH & CAPP STREETS//EXHMA:DEF'S #C- PHOTO OF 24TH & CAPP STREETS/EXHMA:DEF'S #D- PHOTO OF 24TH & CAPP STREETS/X:PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING/HTA1:1,2/X:THE MAGISTRATE FINDS THE OFFENSE OF PC 30305(A)(1) A FELONY SHOWN  BY THE EVIDENCE, HAS BEEN COMMITTED, AND THERE IS SUFFICIENT CAUSE TO  BELIEVE THE DEFENDANT GUILTY THEREOF, IT IS ORDERED THAT SAID DEFENDANT BE HELD TO ANSWER AS TO PC 30305(A)(1), FELONY/X:MISDEMEANORCOUNTS 3 & 4 ARE CERTIFIED/BAIL:185000/X:BAIL REMAINS AT $185,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION ON 02-03-15 IN D-22/DOP/
/CAL PRELIM HRG & DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X SUB, CAD RELEASED TO DEFENSE/TXT:TRANS TO DEPT 28/TRANS 28:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TOSUPPRESS/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 01-21-15/BAIL:185000     /X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: MATTER WAS DISMISSED ON 02-19-15 IN DEPARTMENT 22/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LDTR:04-06-15/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TRIAL/DOP/TE:2 WEEKS/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/LDPX:01-21-15/X:THE PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 01-20-15 IS CONFIRMED,/
